title: Retailer free-shipping baselines (free-ship thresholds for guest / non-member buyers)

rows.note: Free Shipping by Amazon: non-Prime free standard shipping at stated minimum of eligible Amazon-fulfilled items. Official page states threshold generically ('stated minimum'); the $35 figure (books $25; some zips $25) is from secondary E2/E3 sources, not stated as a number on this official page.
UNVERIFIED on official page: books-only $25 threshold reported only by secondary guides; official help page does not state a numeric book threshold.

Non-member free standard shipping at $35+ eligible items; below-minimum fee $6.99. Walmart+ members have no order minimum for items sold/shipped by Walmart. Pharmacy/photo/wireless/tires do not count.
Free 2-day shipping on eligible items at $35+ minimum purchase. Target Circle Card (formerly RedCard) holders bypass the $35 minimum. Oversized/select items excluded.

$35 minimum (after coupons, before taxes) for free ship-to-home; waived for My Best Buy / Plus / Total members. Marketplace products never free-ship regardless of total. Excludes digital downloads, e-gift cards, special/specialty/scheduled-delivery items.
eBay has no platform-wide free-shipping threshold. Shipping cost and any 'free shipping' offer are set per-listing by each seller (Buyer pays vs Seller pays). No universal numeric baseline exists.

rows.value: threshold varies by product/country (no universal figure)
rows.note: Official AliExpress Free Shipping T&C: free shipping is threshold-based per Participating Product; threshold amount 'may vary' and is per the product detail page and country-specific pages. No single universal number is published officially.

UNVERIFIED on official source: AliExpress Choice consolidated free-ship thresholds (~$1.99 accessories / ~$3.99 general / 3-item bundle) reported only by secondary guides; the official contract page confirms threshold-based free shipping but does not publish these Choice numbers. Caution: auto-consolidation can push combined value over import de-minimis.
